sections.paragraph:
- Original: σωματικῶς

- Transliteration: Somatikos

- Phonetic: so-mat-ee-koce'

- Definition:

1. bodily, corporally

a. of the exalted spiritual body, visible only to the inhabitants of heaven

- Origin: from G4984

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Adverb from G4984; corporeally or physically: - bodily.
